description: Patient Thomas Vance had a screening colonoscopy today where a benign adenomatous polyp was found. Clinical guidelines dictate a follow-up screening in exactly 3 years. Login to FreeMED (Username: admin, Password: admin) and create a Patient Recall for Thomas Vance for a 'Colonoscopy' due exactly 3 years from today's date. Include the note: 'Benign polyp found, 3-year follow-up required'.
